description.unified: Dispels harmful effects from the ally with the lowest current HP and restores HP [1159*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient))+188.1% ATK->529*(1+0.3*Skill Level)+330.6% ATK] 3 times. When healing the target, nearby allies are additionally healed for 40% of the healing amount.

Grants [4 ally with the highest damage dealt->all allies] a shield that absorbs [795*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient))+129% ATK->1080*(1+0.3*Skill Level)+675.6% ATK] damage for [16 sec->7 sec]. While the shield [is active->lasts], [Healing Rate increases by 11% and CC Resistance increases by 100->the target’s ATK increases by 25%, Healing Power by 65%, and Status Resistance by 600].

Deals Magic DMG to the target and nearby enemies 6 times, then inflicts Blind for [2sec->3.5 sec], [ (added) and increases Magic DMG taken by 25% for 10 sec]. This skill applies Critical Rate [800->500] [ (removed) increased->higher].

[ (added) Magic DMG taken is reduced by 15%.] At the start of each battle [ (removed) or every 15 sec->or every 14 sec], [heals 2 allies->restores 15% of Max HP to the 1 allies] with the lowest current HP [ (removed) for 1.5% of Max HP 10 times], and increases [Magic DEF by 157+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)->their Magic DEF by 60*(1+0.3*Skill Level) for 7 sec].

dark.unified: Healed allies take [40%->25%] less Magic DMG for 10 sec.

light.unified: [Mana cost increases by 1000 and damage increases by 80%->Increases the target’s Physical DMG taken by 10% for 10 sec].

dark.unified: [Changes the target to random enemies->Increases the target’s Magic DMG taken by 10% for 10 sec].

light.unified: [Reduces DMG the target takes from Non-Hero enemies by 40% for the duration of Skill->Activates [Goddess Grace] additionally at the start of every battle].

dark.unified: Number of targets changes to [ (removed) 1 ally -> 2]. [ (removed) Magic DMG taken by Frey is reduced by 20%].

Every 8 sec, heals [4 allies->the 4 allies] with the lowest current HP [for->by] {0}% of ATK, and increases the Critical Rate [by 160->of the 4 allies with the highest ATK by 200], and Critical DMG by {1}% [ (removed) of 4 allies with the highest ATK] for 8 sec.
